title: Are European citizens still trusting public television and radio networks?
subtitle: In 2023 on average 48% of the interviewed EU citizens tend to trust the public media.
textNote: The survey was conducted via computer-assisted web interviewing (CAWI) using Ipsos online panels and partner networks, with some respondents additionally recruited through social media. Fieldwork took place from 18 to 24 October 2023 among EU citizens aged 15+ across the EU27, with 25,956 total interviews.
